items.title: Sensor driver (BLE)
items.desc: Read from 4 cheap Bluetooth LE thermometers. Pi scans every 60 s, writes the latest reading per sensor.

items.title: Local storage choice
items.desc: Where the year-long history actually lives on the Pi. Trade-off between query speed, disk footprint, and tooling overhead.

options.name: SQLite (append-only)
options.desc: One file, no daemon, easy backups by cp. Best for the 1-writer/N-reader shape we have.

options.name: DuckDB
options.desc: Columnar — faster aggregations over a year of minute readings. Heavier binary, less ubiquitous on the Pi.

options.name: Per-day CSV files
options.desc: Most portable; manual aggregation queries; cheapest backup story. No transactions.

items.title: Web UI
items.desc: Single-page app on the Pi, served on the LAN. Chart + room picker + CSV download. No build step beyond `make`.

items.title: Alert pipeline
items.desc: Rolling-window check every 5 min; fires to a local ntfy.sh instance, which the homeowner has subscribed to from their phone.
